text: - **Color**: cool ink neutrals (not the AI-default cream), with a single warm **amber accent** as the "live wire / presence signal" — deliberately warm-on-cool. A functional **cyan** marks "the other vendor's agent" in transcripts (warm/cool = two different hosts, which is *meaningful*, not decorative). Semantic green for online dots only. Terminal panes stay dark in both themes — terminals *are* dark; that's honest.
